---
title: "Session 9: Iterative Prompt Improvement & Error Analysis"
subtitle: "Day 3 · Prompt Design & Iteration (3-3)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 9: Iterative Prompt Improvement & Error Analysis

## 📋 Agenda

- Error analysis of misclassifications
- Iterate the prompt over 2–3 cycles
- A short under-the-hood walkthrough

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Error analysis

## Error analysis

<!-- to be added -->

# Iterating the prompt

## Iterating the prompt

<!-- to be added -->

# Under the hood

## Under the hood

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
